service: TunnelMind Receipt Format v1.0 — revocation feed
polling_advice: Cache for at least 60s. The endpoint at https://data.tunnelmind.ai/v1/receipt/revoked is preferred for single-receipt or single-key checks; this feed is for verifiers that want to maintain a local mirror of the full revocation set.
notes: A revoked key invalidates every receipt signed by that key after revoked_at (receipts signed BEFORE revoked_at remain provisionally valid if the verifier trusts the issuer's compromise window).
A revoked receipt is a per-receipt retraction by the issuer (e.g., issued in error, contains erroneous payload). receipt_id is the uuidv7 from the receipt envelope.
Both arrays are empty at launch. Genuinely empty — not a placeholder. Verifiers should treat 'lookup returned, list empty' as authoritative.
